title: Verify make seed end-to-end + negative paths
description:
## Objective
Manual integration check that the plumbing works. Three positive checks and two negative checks.

## Spec Reference
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold-spec.md — Section: Step 5

## Scope
**Files:** none modified — runtime verification only

## Implementation
Positive:
1. make supabase-reset-database — succeeds; verify zero rows in companies / contacts / deals / tasks / tags via supabase studio (http://localhost:54323) or via psql
2. make seed — succeeds; verify exactly one row in tags with name='__seed_smoke_test__'
3. make seed again — succeeds (reset wipes the smoke-test row, then it's re-inserted); idempotent in the sense that you can keep running it

Negative:
4. SUPABASE_URL=https://example.supabase.co npx tsx scripts/seed-supabase.ts — exits non-zero with a 'non-local' message; DB unchanged
5. After a successful make seed, run npx tsx scripts/seed-supabase.ts directly (without resetting first) — exits non-zero with a 'DB not clean' message

If any of these fail, fix the seeder until they pass. Do not move on.

## Tests
The five checks above are the tests for this iteration.
Do NOT close until all five pass.
